name: Eyes of Ethiron
desc: TheÂ forge's touch peels back history's layered retellings and scrapes bare the blade's past.Â Godstorm, the wind that bore a shadow. An eye at the heart of each furling spiral. In some senses, it was only in the years where theÂ GodstormÂ was dormant that the wind and shadow could be considered separate.
